reviews.comment:
Estuve en el restaurante de aca La comida genial , no tardaron mucho el lugar calentito lindo . La milanesa napolitana grande rica buen sabor y tierna . Lo único que no me gustó q en la cuanta vino la mesera y me dijo acá está el precio tarjeta , acá está el precio efectivo y acá lo que tenés que dajarme de propina osea el 10% que gaste . Gastas 100 mil y 10mil de propina , no me parece xq es algo a voluntad y de última q la empresa le pague un poco mejor

(Translated by Google)
I was at the restaurant here. The food was great, the service was quick, and the place was nice and warm. The large Neapolitan milanesa was delicious, flavorful, and tender. The only thing I didn't like was that when the bill came, the waitress came and told me, "Here's the card price, here's the cash price, and here's what you have to leave me as a tip, meaning 10% of what I spent." You spend 100,000 and get a 10,000 tip. I don't think that's fair because it's something you can give at your discretion, and the company should pay her a little better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3aWV0NBAB

reviews.comment:
